code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  if b == 32
    true
  else if b == 9
    true
  else if b == 13
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

fn non_empty_after_rstrip(_ line: String) -> Bool
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if not is_ws(b)
        found = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  found
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut last: Option<String> = None
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        if non_empty_after_rstrip(current)
          last = Some(current)
        end
        current = ""
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if non_empty_after_rstrip(current)
    last = Some(current)
  end
  match last
  when Some(s)
    println(s)
  when None
    println("(none)")
  end
end
